stem: The sum of the present ages of a father and his son is 6 years more than 5 times the present age of the son. After 2 years, 3 times the father's age will be 7 years less than 6 times the son's age. The difference (in years) between the ages of the father and the son is:
A ray of light is incident on a concave mirror at point M. The ray makes an angle of 50° with a line joining M to the centre of curvature. The ray is reflected at an angle of ________.

stem:
Which two signs should be interchanged to make the following equation correct?
13 ÷ 6 × 12 − 4 + 5 = 4

Amongst six friends P, Q, R, S, T and U, each has a different height. R is taller than only three other friends. T is taller than only one friend. Q is taller than T but shorter than U. U is shorter than P. Who is the second tallest among all the friends?
________ is a type of crescent-shaped sand dune formed in desert regions where the wind direction is very constant.
Which of the following is NOT a metal?
Who was the Viceroy of British India when the Rowlatt Act was passed?
If 3.2 : x :: x : 16.2, and x > 0, then find the value of x.
Under the 'Drone Smarch and Development' component of 'Kheti Safar' programme to carry out lethal identification, the country has been divided into how many zones as of July 2022?
Which of the following is a classical language among the 22 languages in the 8th Schedule of the Indian Constitution?
Sonam's present age is twice that of Venkat's. Venkat's age, after 12 years, will be 13 years. Find Sonam's present age.
The sayings or day-to-day teachings of Prophet Muhammad after his death were compiled by his followers and called ________.

The annual income of Ram is ₹3,62,400. He spent 20% of this income on house rent, 10% of the remaining income on food, and 30% of the income still remaining with him on children's education. If the amount still remaining was his savings, which of the following amounts is closest to his actual savings?
How many tennis venues were scheduled to be a part of the 13th edition of the Indian Premier League (Cricket), 2022?
